svg.title: Twitch Clone System Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture map showing the full-stack Twitch clone built with Next.js, RTMP, WebSockets, LiveKit, and external services.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the viewer experience in the Twitch clone')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the streamer dashboard in the Twitch clone')
sendPrompt('How does OBS connect to the Twitch clone via RTMP?')
sendPrompt('What pages exist in the Next.js Twitch clone app?')
sendPrompt('How does the creator dashboard work in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('What are the server actions in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('What API routes exist in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('How does middleware work in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('What React components make up the Twitch clone UI?')
sendPrompt('How does the search service work in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('How does Tailwind CSS work in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('How does TypeScript help in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('How does LiveKit power streaming in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('How does Prisma and the database work in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('How does Clerk handle authentication in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('How does UploadThing handle thumbnails in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('How does WebSocket live chat work in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('How does Zustand manage state in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('How do webhooks work in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('How does Next.js cache revalidation work in the Twitch clone?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the User model in the Twitch clone schema')

sendPrompt('How does the follow model work in the Twitch clone schema?')
sendPrompt('How does the block model work in the Twitch clone schema?')
